companyAnnouncements: Claude OpenRouter Launcher: run Claude Code through any OpenRouter backend — a Fusion panel, a model alias, or a provider-pinned preset — via profiles + modes. Run ./setup.sh once (creates your presets), then bin/claude-openrouter --profile NAME --mode MODE (or -g; works with -p). Commands: bin/claude-openrouter profiles | modes | doctor. Dev: just check / lint / test. Edit profiles & modes in config/modes.json; see README.md.
